proposal_summary: This proposal finalizes the engagement of ChainSecurity and Certora as joint Security Service Providers (SSPs) for the Compound DAO, along with ZeroShadow for incident response, for a 12-month term starting August 18, 2025. It authorizes a total budget of $2,000,000 USD, to be streamed in COMP tokens via the Compound Streamer.

disclosed_entities.name: ChainSecurity
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: the DAO has elected to appoint ChainSecurity and Certora as its joint security service providers

disclosed_entities.name: Certora
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: the DAO has elected to appoint ChainSecurity and Certora as its joint security service providers

disclosed_entities.name: ZeroShadow
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: the DAO will also engage ZeroShadow to deliver incident response and monitoring services

disclosed_entities.name: Compound Foundation
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: Following a multi-week evaluation by the Compound Foundation

disclosed_entities.name: OpenZeppelin
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: ensuring a smooth transition from the existing relationship with OpenZeppelin

disclosed_entities.name: Community Multisig
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: resolve security incidents in coordination with the Community Multisig

disclosed_entities.name: Compound Streamer
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: authorize the creation of two COMP token streams via the Compound Streamer

disclosed_entities.name: COMP
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: Funds will be streamed in COMP tokens

claimed_actions.raw_action: authorize the creation of two COMP token streams via the Compound Streamer
claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Sets up two payment streams for the security service providers with specific parameters including duration, slippage, and claim cooldown.
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: If passed, this proposal will authorize the creation of two COMP token streams via the Compound Streamer

claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Transfers approximately 45,000 COMP (39,375 to ChainSecurity & Certora, 5,625 to ZeroShadow) into the Streamer contracts to fund the 12-month engagement.
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: At the time of onchain vote submission, 45,000 COMP approximates the $2.2M total, of which, 39,375 will be deposited in the ChainSecurity & Certora stream, and 5,625 will be allocated to the ZeroShadow stream.

claimed_complexity.reason: The proposal involves configuring and funding two separate streaming contracts with specific parameters (duration, slippage, cooldown) and a buffer for price volatility.
claimed_complexity.textual_evidence: Funds will be streamed in COMP tokens through the Compound Streamer. The amount of COMP streamed will be USD-adjusted using Chainlink price feeds... a 10% buffer will be applied to each stream

disclosed_functions.textual_evidence: An onchain proposal must call the terminateStream() function in order for cancellation to occur.

limitations: COMP price volatility might require additional funding if the 10% buffer is insufficient to cover the $2M USD equivalent over the 12-month term.
Stream cancellation requires a 60-day notice period and a separate onchain proposal to call terminateStream().
